title: Crystal Crusher
description: Mod that adds the Crystal Crusher from the Calamity mod from Terraria
body:
The Crystal Crusher is a powerful, end-game-tier pickaxe brought into the world of Minecraft, inspired by its legendary counterpart from the Calamity Mod in Terraria. Forged from pure energy and enchanted crystal, this tool is far more than just a pickaxe... it’s a mining machine in your hands.

For: Forge 1.20.1


Version: 1.0.0

When held, the Crystal Crusher behaves like a normal pickaxe… until you hold down right-click. That’s when it truly awakens. The pickaxe drills through stone, dirt, and ores almost instantly, tearing through terrain with unmatched speed – while leaving unbreakable blocks like bedrock untouched.

Features:

![Crystal Crusher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb938f62b3191fc7d935f17e7130deaba88f1d69.png)

- 💎 Extremely fast mining ability activated by holding right-click.

- 🔥 Stronger than Netherite, but carefully balanced for survival play.

- ⚔️ High attack damage, making it viable as a weapon in emergencies.

- 🛡️ Immune to fire and lava damage – a true tool for the depths.

- 🛠️ Crafted with rare materials using a vanilla-style recipe, no commands or setups required.

Whether you're carving out massive underground bases or diving into ancient cave systems, the Crystal Crusher will be your most trusted tool. Built for speed, strength, and style, this is the ultimate reward for any miner who dares to dig deeper.

Crafting recipe:

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb5a71f911f3a259863a4304b9340dac2a23f2cb.png)

- 2 Netherite blocks

- 1 End Crystal

- 1 Amethyst Shard

- 1 Netherite pickaxe

Curseforge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crystal-crusher](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crystal-crusher)
